decision: v4 WAI-Harness was DISTRIBUTED into 26 spokes + hub BEFORE strong verification or code completion (6/48 epic ACs full, 37 partial, single-agent self-reviewed). Speed chosen over completeness.
why_debt: A distributed-but-unverified harness means the fleet may be running on built-not-wired or partially-correct mechanisms; a defect propagates widely before it is caught. The fresh-actor audit this session already caught 2 self-overclaims in one small reconciliation — extrapolate to 26 spokes.
rectification: After the prevent-state-decay hardening lands and the epic reaches a trustworthy bar, run a fleet-wide verification pass (per-spoke harness_upgrade verify + AC-evidence audit) BEFORE relying on any distributed v4 behavior. Do NOT activate more spokes on v4 until then.
tracked_as: impl-v4-fleet-verification-pass-v1 (to be created when hardening lands)
verification_done: fleet-verification-pass-2026-06-10: integrity PASS 27/27, currency STALE 27/27, activation DORMANT 27/27. Latent risk only (nothing live on v4).
residual: Fleet must be brought CURRENT + re-verified per-spoke BEFORE activation (task-fleet-recurrency-before-activation-v1). v4 stays dormant until then.
